question: Who was the president of the host country when the 2026 NATO summit took place?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
The 2026 NATO summit was held in Ankara, Turkey, on 7–8 July 2026 (NATO.int; Wikipedia). The host country's president at that time was **Recep Tayyip Erdoğan**, who has served as President of Turkey since 2014.

Sources:
- https://www.nato.int/en/news-and-events/events/2026/07/overview---2026-nato-summit-in-ankara-
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Ankara_NATO_summit

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
The host country was **Türkiye**, whose president at the time was **Recep Tayyip Erdoğan**. The NATO summit took place in Ankara on **7–8 July 2026**.

Sources: [NATO](https://www.nato.int/en/news-and-events/articles/news/2025/08/20/turkiye-to-host-2026-nato-summit-in-ankara), [Al Jazeera](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/7/7/nato-summit-begins-who-is-attending-and-what-is-at-stake)
